class.name: ManualArrayInspector
class.brief_description: UI class that acts as an "inspector" for the [b]EffectArray[/b] within [b]GodotStylizedShadersPlugin[/b].
class.description: UI class that acts as an "inspector" for the [b]EffectArray[/b] within [b]GodotStylizedShadersPlugin[/b].

signal.name: order_changed
signal.description: Can be used to check whether the order in which the effects are stored in the array has been changed. This signal is used to update the main EffectArray.
